clusters.justification: Maps to the salience and limbic macroscopic networks, encompassing the broad functional integration of autonomic arousal, mood regulation, and the physiological coding of valenced stimuli.
Anchored in the frontostriatal and reward circuitries, this domain captures the macro-level processing of incentive salience, reinforcement learning, and goal-directed cost-benefit computations.

Rooted in the default mode network, this axis represents internally-directed mental models spanning autobiographical memory, self-referential thought, and the conceptual processing of interacting agents.
